## Summary

## Quality Gates
- [ ] Builds successfully
- [ ] Passes all tests
- [ ] No critical lint errors
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] API documented
- [ ] Security reviewed
- [ ] DB migrations validated (if applicable)
- [ ] CI green

## Design Principle Check
- [ ] Simple over clever
- [ ] Readable over shorter
- [ ] Stable over new-feature-shortcut
- [ ] Modular over tightly coupled
- [ ] Explicit over magic
